conversation.text: right-side purple bubble
PlugAI
You just ruined the beach for everyone else
Huh? How? 😭
You just ruined the beach for everyone else
Cuz now every wave looks boring compared to you
Huh? How? 😭
Crazy how it’s true tho
Oh goddd 😭😭
You say that to every girl?
Nah, most girls don’t even surf through my mind like you did
Not sure if I should be flattered or scared 😂
Be flattered. I’m only dangerous if you hate being treated right
You don’t even know me 😭
That’s why I’m here. Trying to fix that.
And what if I’m not easy to get to know?
Then I’ll enjoy the challenge.
You’re too smooth for your own good
Or just smooth enough to be exactly what you didn’t know you wanted
Curiosity looks good on you
Stop it 😭 I’m actually smiling now
Mmm I don’t usually give my number that quick
Then give me a challenge
Guess the digits one by one over dinner
Okayyyy wait that was hot
Fine.
That’s what I call progress 😉
Text me. I’m not missing this vibe ❤️
